allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Write-Host '=== HTTP_PROXY ==='; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('HTTP_PROXY','User'\); [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('HTTP_PROXY','Machine'\); Write-Host '=== HTTPS_PROXY ==='; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('HTTPS_PROXY','User'\); [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('HTTPS_PROXY','Machine'\); Write-Host '=== NO_PROXY ==='; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('NO_PROXY','User'\); [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('NO_PROXY','Machine'\)")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process -Id 3656 | Format-Table ProcessName,Id; Get-Process -Id 11184 | Format-Table ProcessName,Id")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command '[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("HTTP_PROXY","http://127.0.0.1:7897","Process"\); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("HTTPS_PROXY","http://127.0.0.1:7897","Process"\); $env:HTTP_PROXY = "http://127.0.0.1:7897"; $env:HTTPS_PROXY = "http://127.0.0.1:7897"; $env:NO_PROXY = "localhost,127.0.0.1"; Write-Host "Proxy set, installing Ubuntu-22.04..."; wsl --install -d Ubuntu-22.04')
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "netsh winhttp set proxy 127.0.0.1:7897; Write-Host 'WinHTTP proxy set.'; wsl --install -d Ubuntu-22.04")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "netsh winhttp reset proxy; Write-Host 'WinHTTP proxy reset.'")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu-22.04 -- bash -c 'cd ~/ros_ws/src && mkdir -p ROS-TCP-Endpoint && tar xzf - -C ROS-TCP-Endpoint && echo "=== TRANSFER DONE ===" && ls ROS-TCP-Endpoint/')
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu-22.04 -- ip addr show eth0)

Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu-22.04 -- bash -c 'source ~/ros_ws/install/setup.bash && source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash && ros2 run ros_tcp_endpoint default_server_endpoint --ros-args -p ROS_IP:=0.0.0.0 -p ROS_TCP_PORT:=10000 &')
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu-22.04 -- bash -c 'ps aux | grep ros_tcp | grep -v grep')
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu-22.04 -- bash -c 'source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash && ros2 topic pub /unity_test std_msgs/String "data: Hello from ROS2!" --once')
